name: standards-refresh.sh --threshold lowers the sufficiency floor so a source meeting it signals sufficiency ok
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r29-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; grep -q 'sufficiency sid=r29-src rule_count=2 sufficiency=ok' e.err && echo configurable-floor-marks-sufficient 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
